settings.title: Register to AEC PM Connect 2026 Kansas

settings.editor:
Join us in Kansas for a high-impact learning and networking experience designed for AEC professionals. This is your chance to connect, exchange ideas, and build lasting relationships in a relaxed, collaborative environment.

Secure your seat early and save with tiered pricing.
Choose the experience that best fits your goals — whether you're attending for the main event, the negotiation workshop, or the complete AEC PM Connect experience.
AEC PM Connect Ticket + Negotiation Ticket Package

settings.title: Best Value: AEC PM Connect + Negotiation Package

settings.editor: Get the complete experience and maximize your investment by attending both Kansas Connect and the Negotiation Session.

Thursday, October 22, 2026

Participate in the full Kansas Connect experience at JCCC, including expert-led sessions, peer learning, and networking.

settings.title: High-stakes Communication: A Foundational Workshop Experience for Project Managers with Dan Oblinger

settings.editor:
Wednesday, October 21, 2026

Add a focused negotiation workshop led by Dan Oblinger, designed to strengthen your confidence and effectiveness in client and project negotiations. Includes coffee and snacks for attendees.

Full access to all Kansas sessions, panels, and closing networking receptions
Digital slide decks & resources
PDH credits where applicable

Team Bundle (auto-applied): 3 tickets or more in one order
$50 off per seat
(applies to Super Early/Early/Standard only; not Last-Chance)

• Full refund up to 30 days before the event
  • 50% refund from 29–14 days before the event
  • No refunds within 13 days of the event
  • Always free transfers to a colleague up to the day before the event
  • If the event is postponed, tickets automatically transfer to the new date or can be converted to credit

metadata._yoast_wpseo_metadesc: Join AEC PM Connect 2026 in Kansas for exclusive networking, expert insights, and game-changing strategies in AEC project management!
